title: OSAの枠組み通じ初めてカンボジアに通信機材など供与合意 日本

title: 兵士死亡受けて米軍が8日連続でイラン攻撃 対立の先鋭化懸念
snippet: アメリカ中央軍はイランの攻撃に対応していた兵士2人が死亡したことを受けて、日本時間の19日朝から8日連続となるイランへの攻撃を行ったと発表し、対立のさらなる先鋭化が懸念されています。

title: ハンガリー前政権で就任の大統領辞任へ 体制刷新図る
snippet: ハンガリーで、EU＝ヨーロッパ連合と対立した前の政権のもとで就任した大統領の解任を盛り込んだ憲法の改正案が議会で可決されて大統領が辞任することになり、マジャル首相は、体制を刷新して汚職対策や司法の独立…

title: ウクライナ軍総司令官の解任検討か イギリス有力紙

title: ウクライナ ロシア大手通信販売会社の倉庫などを攻撃

title: 中国と北朝鮮の貿易総額 ことし上半期はコロナ拡大前の水準超
snippet: 中国と北朝鮮の間のことし上半期の貿易総額は前の年の同じ時期から19％余り増え、両国の関係強化の流れが反映された形です。

title: US and Iran trade fire after two US soldiers killed in Jordan
snippet: Kuwait says an electricity and water plant is on fire after the second such attack in two days. Iran says US strikes hit an under-construction nuclear power plant.

title: Tate brothers arrested in US as further UK charges take total to 59
snippet: The Crown Prosecution Service says it has requested their extradition from the US, while their lawyer says they are innocent.

title: Russia launches major ballistic missile attack on Ukrainian cities
snippet: Eight people die and dozens are injured as several cities are hit by missile and drone attacks, while Kyiv continues its own assault on Russian infrastructure.

title: New EU border system tripling time at passport control, airport boss says
snippet: Ryanair has also warned passengers travelling to Europe this summer to prepare for extended waits.

title: The 1975's Matty Healy marries model Gabbriette Bechtel in Los Angeles
snippet: The newlyweds were first linked in 2023 after Healy's brief relationship with Taylor Swift.

title: Ferry carrying 133 passengers and crew sinks off Guyana coast
snippet: Fifteen children are among 67 people rescued, officials say, with dozens still missing.

title: Health officials identify source of US explosive diarrhoea outbreak
snippet: The US Food and Drug Administration says iceberg lettuce supplied by Taylor Farms and sold at Taco Bell and Walmart locations was the source of cyclosporiasis infections.

title: Neighbours actor Terence Donovan dies aged 90
snippet: His son, actor Jason Donovan, posted to social media that his father died on Saturday night peacefully in Melbourne, Australia

title: Cuban dissident Luis Manuel Otero Alcántara goes into exile in US
snippet: He was arrested in 2021 during Cuba's largest anti-government protests in decades and spent five years ⁠in prison.

title: Runners complete 'world's coolest marathon' on drifting North Pole ice
snippet: Organisers say 23 runners from seven countries took part in races at the Arctic's geographic North Pole.

title: Hungary's president agrees to stand down after parliament backs removal
snippet: Tamás Sulyok, seen as an Orbán loyalist, had until Saturday night to agree to end his term.

title: German politician resigns over surrogacy child controversy
snippet: Jens Spahn faced criticism over his use of a surrogate, a ban on which he previously backed.

title: Laos says it can't determine cause of  tourist deaths linked to methanol
snippet: Officials say they have no evidence of poisoning over the 2024 deaths because autopsies were not conducted.

title: Space start-up launches India’s first commercial rocket designed for orbit
snippet: India's first space-tech unicorn Skyroot Aerospace successfully launched Vikram-1 on Saturday.

title: Trump threatens new Canada tariffs over fires sending 'filthy' air into US cities
snippet: Canadian leader Mark Carney says both the US and Canada have an equal responsibility to fight climate change, which experts say are worsening wildfire conditions.
